calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Ora Prochovnick, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Karen Ann Butulia is present.
Attorney Jaimie Bombard for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joshua L. Smith is present.
Attorney J. Kevin Webb appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 23, 2016 remains on calendar.
